summary: Incomplete deliverable. Required .test.ts files and fixture JSON files (basic.json, with-excludes.json, etc.) are not shown; workflow's `bun test` step has no tests to run and will fail. Actions pinned to major versions (v2, v4) not full SHAs (40 hex). JSON extraction in workflow via `bun -e` piping (workflow:43-44, 49-50) is fragile and breaks if stdout format changes. No input validation on config JSON in main.ts. Act test harness relies on brittle grep extraction. Core generator logic is sound but deliverable doesn't meet stated requirements (TDD, unit tests, fixtures, all tests via bun/act).
